name: Microsoft Edge
description: Chromium-based web browser from Microsoft with AI-powered Copilot, enterprise features, and deep OS integration

extraction.json_path: Microsoft AutoUpdate (MAU) proprietary protocol — returns update manifest with version, download URL, and metadata

version_check.notes: Requires product GUID for Edge macOS stable. MAU protocol is proprietary — endpoint returns XML/JSON manifest with version and download info.

release_date.field: Last-Modified of the PKG download at https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2069148

notes: Uses Microsoft AutoUpdate (MAU) framework, not Sparkle. The generic PKG download redirects to the latest stable version. MAU GUID for Edge macOS stable is required for the update API call. Generic download link may not always point to the latest version immediately after release.
